about#client-version.message: Versión del cliente para Windows de Sifoon:
about#client-version.description: Footer on the 'About' page indicating the client version number. This text is the prefix to the actual number. Like: 'Sifoon for Windows client version: 88'. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

about#description.message: Sifoon es una herramienta de elusión de la censura — está diseñada para proporcionar acceso a la Internet abierta, dejando atrás censores y cortafuegos (firewalls). Es de código abierto y está desarrollada en Toronto, Canadá.
about#description.description: Paragraph on the 'About' page telling users generally what Sifoon is. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

about#get-by-email.message: Si el sitio web no está accesible, puede obtener una versión nueva de Sifoon enviando un correo electrónico a:
about#get-by-email.description: Paragraph on the 'About' page telling users that they can also get a new version of Sifoon via email. The text in this resource is then followed by an email address. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

about#license-agree.message: Al usar Sifoon, indicas que estás de acuerdo con los términos de la Licencia de Usuario Final y la Política de Privacidad.
about#license-agree.description: Paragraph on the 'About' page telling users that they agreeing to Sifoon's End-User License Agreement and Privacy Policy. The link URLs must not be modified. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

about#visit-download-site.message: Por favor, visite el sitio web para descargar una nueva versión o para obtener ayuda e información. Sifoon está disponible para Android y Windows.
about#visit-download-site.description: Paragraph on the 'About' page telling users what web page to go to get a new version of Sifoon or more info about it. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

about#wordart-tag.description: The application/product/tool tagline/slogan/motto part of the fancy title at the top of the 'About' page. 'Beyond Borders' is the slogan that is also used on the Sifoon website -- it is meant to suggest that Sifoon can help users to get to the internet beyond the border (firewall) of the country they live in. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

appbackend#disallowed-traffic-notificati.message: Activa Aumento de Velocidad para desbloquear el potencial completo de tu experiencia Sifoon.
appbackend#disallowed-traffic-notificati.description: Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon disallows some non-web internet traffic. The user needs to purchase Speed Boost in order to full app compatibilty and more speed. 'Speed Boost' is a reward that can be purchased with PsiCash credit. It provides unlimited network connection speed through Sifoon. Other words that can be used to help with translation are: 'turbo' (like cars), 'accelerate', 'warp speed', 'blast off', or anything that indicates a fast or unrestricted speed.
Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon disallows some non-web internet traffic. The user needs to purchase Speed Boost in order to full app compatibilty and more speed.

appbackend#minimized-to-systray-body.message: Haga clic en el icono para restaurar la aplicación
appbackend#minimized-to-systray-body.description: Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon has been minimized to the Windows' notification area (aka 'system tray' aka 'systray', the area of the taskbar with the clock, battery indicator, and other icons).

appbackend#minimized-to-systray-title.message: Sifoon se ha minimizado en el área de notificación
appbackend#minimized-to-systray-title.description: Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon has been minimized to the Windows' notification area (aka 'system tray' aka 'systray', the area of the taskbar with the clock, battery indicator, and other icons). The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

appbackend#os-unsupported.message:
Sifoon only supports Windows 10 and newer.
Please visit our website for more information.
appbackend#os-unsupported.description: Appears in a message box when Sifoon is run on an unsupported version of Windows. Is followed by a URL.

appbackend#state-connected-body.description: Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon is currently connected to a server. Specifically, it appears when the connection has just completed. This is intended to be a reference to the 'Sifoon: Beyond Borders' tag line. Note for right-to-left languages: You should not use an exclamation mark, as it won't be displayed correct if shown on a left-to-right operating system.

appbackend#state-connected-reminder-body.message: Contribuya a que Sifoon siga siendo gratuito. ¡Pulse aquí para visitar las páginas de nuestros patrocinadores!
appbackend#state-connected-reminder-body.description: Appears in the notification area balloon periodically while Sifoon is connected to a server. This is intended to encourage the user to visit the sponsor's landing page. Note for right-to-left languages: You should not use an exclamation mark, as it won't be displayed correct if shown on a left-to-right operating system. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

appbackend#state-connected-reminder-body.message: ¡Contribuya que Sifoon siga siendo gratuito visitando las páginas de nuestros patrocinadores!
appbackend#state-connected-reminder-body.description: Appears in the notification area balloon periodically while Sifoon is connected to a server. This is intended to encourage the user to visit the sponsor's landing page. Note for right-to-left languages: You should not use an exclamation mark, as it won't be displayed correct if shown on a left-to-right operating system. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

appbackend#state-connected-reminder-titl.description: Appears in the notification area balloon periodically while Sifoon is connected to a server. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

appbackend#state-connected-title.description: Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon is currently connected to a server. Specifically, it appears when the connection has just completed. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

appbackend#state-starting-body.description: Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon is in the process of connecting to a server. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

appbackend#state-starting-title.description: Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon is in the process of connecting to a server. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

appbackend#state-stopped-title.description: Appears in the notification area balloon when Sifoon is disconnected (or has lost its connection, or has been disconnected). The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

banner#long-connecting.message:
¡Oh no! ¡Parece que está teniendo problemas al conectar!
Descargue la última versión de Sifoon del sitio de descargas envíenos un correo electrónico para facilitársela a
banner#long-connecting.description: Message that appears when Sifoon is having trouble connecting. Often such connection problems can be fixed by downloading a new version. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

banner#sponsored-by.description: Text appears above the sponsor banner image. So it kind of reads 'Sponsored by BBC' (for example).

connection#connect-btn.description: Text on the big connection button telling the user that if they click it, Sifoon will start trying to connect to the network. This is shown to the user while Sifoon is disconnected.

connection#connected-msg.description: Message in the big connection status box telling the user that Sifoon is currently connected to the network. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

connection#disconnect-btn.description: Text on the big connection button telling the user that if they click it, they will be disconnected from the network. This is shown when the user is currently connected.

connection#egress-region-combo-label.description: The label for the 'Sifoon Server Region' combo box control located on the connection tab.

connection#starting-msg.description: Message in the big connection status box telling the user that Sifoon is currently trying to connect to the network. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

connection#stop-btn.description: Text on the big connection button telling the user that if they click it, they will stop trying to connect to the network. This is shown to the user when they are trying to connect.

connection#stopped-msg.description: Message in the big connection status box telling the user that Sifoon is currently not connected to the network. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

connection#stopping-msg.description: Message in the big connection status box telling the user that Sifoon is currently trying to disconnect from the network. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

connection#wait-btn.description: Text on the big connection button telling the user to wait while Sifoon tries to disconnect from the network. When this message is shown, the button is disabled.

feedback#diagnostic_check.message: Suba datos de diagnóstico. Por favor, observe que estos datos de diagnóstico no le identifican, y nos ayudarán a mantener Sifoon funcionando como la seda Haga clic aquí para ver qué datos recopilamos.
feedback#diagnostic_check.description: Checkbox text. If it is checked, diagnostic information about Sifoon's status will be sent along with the feedback to Sifoon Inc. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

feedback#smiley_happy.message: Sifoon conecta y funciona de la forma que yo quiero.
feedback#smiley_happy.description: The text below the 'happy face' feedback choice. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

feedback#smiley_sad.message: Sifoon falla a menudo al conectar o no funciona suficientemente bien.
feedback#smiley_sad.description: The text below the 'sad face' feedback choice. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

feedback#submit_button.description: Submit button text. If the user clicks it, their feedback will be sent to Sifoon Inc.

feedback#success-message.description: Message shown to user after their feedback has been sent successufully

feedback#text_feedback_bottom_para.message: Si el formulario de arriba no está funcionando, o si desea enviar capturas de pantalla, por favor, escríbanos un correo a feedback@psiphon.ca.
feedback#text_feedback_bottom_para.description: Message showing the user an email they can use to contact Sifoon Inc.

feedback#text_feedback_email_prompt.message: Si desea que le respondamos, por favor, introduzca su dirección de correo electrónico:
feedback#text_feedback_email_prompt.description: Label for a text field where the user can provide an email address to Sifoon Inc. along with their feedback.

feedback#text_feedback_prompt.message: Por favor, introduzca sus comentarios aquí:
feedback#text_feedback_prompt.description: Label for a text box where the user can provide a feedback message to Sifoon Inc.

feedback#top_para_2.message: Muchos problemas pueden arreglarse descargando la versión más reciente. Puede descargar la última versión haciendo clic aquí, o puede enviar un correo electrónico a .
feedback#top_para_2.description: Text telling the user that downloading a new version of Sifoon may be beneficial, and how to get a new version.

feedback#top_para_3.message: También puede encontrar soluciones a muchos problemas comunes en nuestras preguntas frecuentes (FAQ).
feedback#top_para_3.description: Text telling the user how to get to the Sifoon FAQ.

general#modal-close-button.description: Text in the button that dismisses a modal dialog. It is often the only button (no 'OK' or 'Cancel', etc.).

general#modal-feedback-button.description: Text in a button that switches to the feedback tab and dismisses a modal dialog.

general#notice-modal-tech-preamble.message: Aquí tiene la información técnica del error:
general#notice-modal-tech-preamble.description: Preamble before the technical message relating to the error being shown. This is generated within the code and may not be very user-friendly (but it may be necessary for the user to figure out what's wrong).

language#success-message.description: A welcome message shown to the user when they first switch to the correct UI language. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

logs#placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when there are not yet any log messages to show. This message is removed when the first log message is added.

logs#show-debug-label.description: Label on a checkbox. If the user checks it, debug log messages will be shown to the user.

nav#about.description: Text on the tab that, if the user clicks on it, switches to the 'About' view. In that view the user can see info about the app, info about Sifoon Inc., and click links for more information.

nav#connection#connected.description: Text on the tab that, if the user clicks on it, switches to the 'Connection' view, that has the connect button. This particular text is shown when Sifoon is connected.

nav#connection#starting.description: Text on the tab that, if the user clicks on it, switches to the 'Connection' view, that has the connect button. This particular text is shown when Sifoon is connecting.

nav#connection#stopped.description: Text on the tab that, if the user clicks on it, switches to the 'Connection' view, that has the connect button. This particular text is shown when Sifoon is disconnected.

nav#connection#stopping.description: Text on the tab that, if the user clicks on it, switches to the 'Connection' view, that has the connect button. This particular text is shown when Sifoon is disconnecting.

nav#feedback.description: Text on the tab that, if the user clicks on it, switches to the 'Feeback' view. In that view the user can send feedback about their experience to Sifoon.

nav#logs.description: Text on the tab that, if the user clicks on it, switches to the 'Logs' view. In that view the user can see the status messages that Sifoon produces as it connects, disconnects, etc.

nav#settings.description: Text on the tab that, if the user clicks on it, switches to the 'Settings' view. In that view the user can change the settings/options that change how Sifoon works.

notice#disallowed-traffic-alert-body.message:
¿Las aplicaciones no están funcionando?

Algún tráfico de Internet no está soportado sin un Aumento de Velocidad activo. Activa Aumento de Velocidad con PsiCash para desbloquear el potencial completo de tu experiencia Sifoon.
notice#disallowed-traffic-alert-body.description: Body text of modal error message shown to user when Sifoon disallows some non-web internet traffic. The user needs to purchase Speed Boost in order to full app compatibilty and more speed. The words 'Sifoon' and 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated. 'Speed Boost' is a reward that can be purchased with PsiCash credit. It provides unlimited network connection speed through Sifoon. Other words that can be used to help with translation are: 'turbo' (like cars), 'accelerate', 'warp speed', 'blast off', or anything that indicates a fast or unrestricted speed.

notice#disallowed-traffic-alert-title.description: Title of modal error message shown to user when Sifoon disallows some non-web internet traffic. The user will be told to 'upgrade' their connection with Speed Boost (giving more speed and app compatibility). The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

notice#sifoonui-fileerror-detail-preambl.message: Nombre del archivo y mensaje de error:
notice#sifoonui-fileerror-detail-preambl.description: Preamble text before technical details displayed in a modal error message shown to user when Sifoon cannot read/write/delete a file that it needs to access in order to function properly.

notice#sifoonui-fileerror-error-body.message:
Sifoon no puede acceder a un archivo que necesita para funcionar correctamente.

Cierra la aplicación de Sifoon, elimina el archivo que se indica a continuación e intenta ejecutar Sifoon nuevamente.
notice#sifoonui-fileerror-error-body.description: Body text of modal error message shown to user when Sifoon cannot read/write/delete a file that it needs to access in order to function properly. If this occurs, the user cannot connect and must take manual action to fix it. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

notice#sifoonui-fileerror-error-title.description: Title of modal error message shown to user when Sifoon cannot read/write/delete a file that it needs to access in order to function properly.

notice#systemproxysettings-setproxy-erro.message:
Sifoon no pudo al establecer la configuración para proxy (interpuesto) del sistema.

Esto podría deberse a un conflicto con su software antivirus. Puede que necesite configurar manualmente su aplicación o los ajustes para proxy de su sistema para que use los servidores proxy locales de Sifoon.
notice#systemproxysettings-setproxy-erro.description: Body text of modal error message shown to user when Sifoon fails to set the user's system proxy settings. This means that Sifoon was able to connect, but was unable to configure the system to actually use Sifoon. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

notice#systemproxysettings-setproxy-erro.message: Error con el proxy del sistema
notice#systemproxysettings-setproxy-erro.description: Title of modal error message shown to user when Sifoon fails to set the user's system proxy settings. This means that Sifoon was able to connect, but was unable to configure the system to actually use Sifoon.

notice#systemproxysettings-setproxy-warn.message: Sifoon no pudo establecer la configuración para proxy (interpuesto) del sistema para la conexión a Internet de nombre “<%- data %>”. Esto podría deberse a un conflicto con su software antivirus. Puede que necesite configurar manualmente su aplicación o los ajustes para proxy del sistema para que usen los servidores proxy locales de Sifoon.
notice#systemproxysettings-setproxy-warn.description: '<%- data %>' is a placeholder and must not be modified. Log message emitted when Sifoon can't fully configure the system to use Sifoon. It may or may not be a fatal state, and may or may not need human intervention. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

positive-value-indicator.description: This is used to indicate when a numeric value is positive -- like '+500'. This will show when a number is going to be increased by another number. '%d' is a placeholder for an integer for decimal value.

psicash#1-day.description: Label on a button. Clicking this button will buy 1 day (24 hours) of Speed Boost.

psicash#1-hour.description: Label on a button. Clicking this button will buy 1 hour of Speed Boost.

psicash#1-month.description: Label on a button. Clicking this button will buy 1 month (31 days) of Speed Boost.

psicash#1-week.description: Label on a button. Clicking this button will buy 1 week (7 days) of Speed Boost.

psicash#alert#buyspeedboost-purchase-com.description: A non-modal alert shown when a new Speed Boost has been activated. 'Speed Boost' is a reward that can be purchased with PsiCash credit. It provides unlimited network connection speed through Sifoon. Other words that can be used to help with translation are: 'turbo' (like cars), 'accelerate', 'warp speed', 'blast off', or anything that indicates a fast or unrestricted speed.

psicash#alert#logged-out.message: Cierre de sesión de cuenta PsiCash completo.
psicash#alert#logged-out.description: An alert shown when the user logs out of their PsiCash account. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#alert#tokens-expired.message: Expiró la sesión PsiCash. Por favor vuelve a iniciar sesión.
psicash#alert#tokens-expired.description: An alert shown when the user's PsiCash account tokens expire. This is a normal occurrence (once per year), and the user needs to log into their PsiCash account again to continue to use it. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#corner-logged-out.description: Message shown to the user when they have a PsiCash account, but they are logged out. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#init-error-body-recovered.message: PsiCash falló al inicializarse. Esto es debido probablemente a un problema del sistema de archivos, como quedarse sin espacio en disco. Tu saldo y otros estados se han restablecido.
psicash#init-error-body-recovered.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when the PsiCash library fails to initialize. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#init-error-body-unrecovered.message: PsiCash falló al inicializarse. Esto es debido probablemente a un problema del sistema de archivos, como quedarse sin espacio en disco. Tu saldo y otros estados se han perdido. PsiCash no podrá usarse. Puedes intentar reiniciando la aplicación para recuperarse del problema.
psicash#init-error-body-unrecovered.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when the PsiCash library fails to initialize. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#init-error-title.description: Title of a modal dialog shown when the PsiCash library fails to initialize. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#login#badrequest-error-body.message: El servidor PsiCash indicó que la solicitud de inicio de sesión fue inválida. Por favor vuelve a ingresar la información para inicio de sesión e intenta de nuevo más tarde.
psicash#login#badrequest-error-body.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when a PsiCash account login fails due to a 'bad request' error. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#login#catastrophic-error-body.message: Su intento de inicio de sesión PsiCash falló inesperadamente.
psicash#login#catastrophic-error-body.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when a PsiCash login fails without a specific reason. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#login#failure-modal-title.description: Title of modal dialog shown when the PsiCash account login attempt fails for some reason. Text within the modal will explain why. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#login#invalid-credentials-body.message: El nombre de usuario o contraseña ingresada es incorrecta.
psicash#login#invalid-credentials-body.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when a PsiCash login fails due to bad username or password.

psicash#login#invalid-credentials-body-m.message: ¿Prefieres crear una cuenta o recuperar tu cuenta?
psicash#login#invalid-credentials-body-m.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when a PsiCash login fails due to bad username or password.

psicash#login#last-tracker-merge-body.message: Tienes sesión iniciada dentro de tu cuenta PsiCash. El saldo preexistente de este dispositivo ha sido transferido dentro de tu cuenta, pero esta es la última vez que ocurrirá una unificacfión de saldos.
psicash#login#last-tracker-merge-body.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when a PsiCash login succeeds. There is a fixed number of times that a user can merge a pre-account balance into a PsiCash account. This message indicates that the user has hit that limit and the merge that occurred is the last one allowed. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#login#server-error-body.message: El servidor PsiCash respondió con un error mientras intentaba iniciar tu sesión. Por favor intenta más tarde.
psicash#login#server-error-body.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when a PsiCash account login fails due to a server error. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#login#success-modal-title.description: Title of modal dialog shown when the PsiCash account login attempt succeeds, if additional information needs to be conveyed. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#modal-create-psicash-account-bod.message: Te animamos enfáticamente a crear una cuenta PsiCash antes de comprar PsiCash. Tener una cuenta te permite compartir tu saldo entre dispositivos y proteger tus compras.
psicash#modal-create-psicash-account-bod.description: Body of a modal dialog that appears when the user tries to buy PsiCash with real money but doens't have an account. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#modal-create-psicash-account-con.description: Button in the modal dialog encouraging users to create an account when they attempt to buy PsiCash with real money without one. If they click this button, they will continue on to the PsiCash store.

psicash#modal-create-psicash-account-cre.message: Crear o iniciar sesión dentro de la cuenta
psicash#modal-create-psicash-account-cre.description: Button in the modal dialog encouraging users to create an account when they attempt to buy PsiCash with real money without one. If they click this button, they will be taken to a screen where they can create an account or log into an existing one.

psicash#modal-create-psicash-account-hea.description: Header of a modal dialog that appears when the user tries to buy PsiCash with real money but doens't have an account. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#modal-login-body.message: Crear una nueva cuenta o iniciar sesión abajo.
psicash#modal-login-body.description: Body of modal dialog in which the user can log in to an existing account or click a link to create a new one.

psicash#modal-login-cancel-button.description: Text on the cancel button in the PsiCash account login modal dialog.

psicash#modal-login-forgot-password-link.message: ¿Olvidaste tu contraseña o nombre de usuario?
psicash#modal-login-forgot-password-link.description: Link for text in the PsiCash account login modal dialog. Clicking it will bring the user to a page where they can recover their account.

psicash#modal-login-header.description: Header of modal dialog in which the user can log in to an existing account or click a link to create a new one. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#modal-login-password-field.description: Label for a password field in the PsiCash account login modal dialog.

psicash#modal-login-submit-button.description: Text on the submit button in the PsiCash account login modal dialog.

psicash#modal-login-username-field.description: Label for a username field in the PsiCash account login modal dialog.

psicash#modal-logout-error-body.message: Tu intento de cierre de sesión falló inesperadamente. Por favor intenta reiniciar la aplicación. Si eso no funciona, necesitarás limpiar tu almacenamiento local.
psicash#modal-logout-error-body.description: Body of modal dialog shown when the user attempts to log out of their PsiCash account and an unexpected error occurs. Please don't modify the link URL.

psicash#modal-logout-header.message: Cierre de sesión de cuenta PsiCash
psicash#modal-logout-header.description: Header of modal dialog shown when the user attempts to log out of their PsiCash account and a message results. 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#modal-psicash-logout-offline-bod.message: Estando conectado a la red Sifoon habilita un cierre de sesión PsiCash más seguro. ¿Te gustaría conectar antes de cerrar sesión?
psicash#modal-psicash-logout-offline-bod.description: Body of a modal dialog that appears when the user tries to log out of thier PsiCash account while not currently connected to the Sifoon network. We don't allow PsiCash network requests when not connected, so only an inferior localy-only logout is available. 'Sifoon' must not be translated/transliterated. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#modal-psicash-logout-offline-can.description: Button in the modal dialog shown to users when they attempt to log out of their PsiCash account with no active Sifoon tunnel. Clicking this button will cancel the attempt.

psicash#modal-psicash-logout-offline-con.description: Button in the modal dialog shown to users when they attempt to log out of their PsiCash account with no active Sifoon tunnel. Clicking this button will abort the logout attempt and being connecting to a Sifoon server.

psicash#modal-psicash-logout-offline-hea.message: Cierre de sesión de cuenta PsiCash
psicash#modal-psicash-logout-offline-hea.description: Header of a modal dialog that appears when the user tries to log out of their PsiCash account. The word 'PsiCash' must not be translated or transliterated.

psicash#modal-psicash-logout-offline-log.description: Button in the modal dialog shown to users when they attempt to log out of their PsiCash account with no active Sifoon tunnel. Clicking this button will cause a local-only logout to be performed.

psicash#more-ellipsis.description: Label for a button that leads to more Speed Boost purchase choices. The translation can be like 'More options' or 'More choices' or 'See more'. Only use an ellipsis if it makes sense in your language.

psicash#mustconnect-modal#body.message: Para poder utilizar PsiCash, debe estar conectado a la red Sifoon.
psicash#mustconnect-modal#body.description: Body text of a modal dialog shown when the user tries to use (spend, buy, etc.) PsiCash, if they not currently connected. 'Use' here means buy, spend, or otherwise interact with. 'Sifoon' must not be translated/transliterated. 'PsiCash' must not be translated/transliterated.

psicash#mustconnect-modal#title.message: Una conexion a Sifoon es requerida.

Por favor, cambie el valor configurado de puerto para proxy HTTP e inténtelo de nuevo. Recomendamos que deje en blanco el valor de forma que Sifoon pueda seleccionar automáticamente un puerto disponible.
settings#local-proxy-ports#error-modal-b.description: Main text in the 'Local Proxy Port Conflict' dialog box. This is shown when the conflict is with the HTTP proxy port, rather than the SOCKS proxy port. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#local-proxy-ports#error-modal-b.message:
Ha configurado Sifoon para que use un puerto local específico para su propio proxy SOCKS.
Sin embargo, ese puerto parece estar ya en uso y por tanto Sifoon no puede usarlo.

Por favor, cambie el valor configurado de puerto para proxy SOCKS e inténtelo de nuevo. Recomendamos que deje en blanco el valor de forma que Sifoon pueda seleccionar automáticamente un puerto disponible.
settings#local-proxy-ports#error-modal-b.description: Main text in the 'Local Proxy Port Conflict' dialog box. This is shown when the conflict is with the SOCKS proxy port, rather than the HTTP proxy port. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#local-proxy-ports#error-modal-t.message: Conflicto de puerto de proxy local
settings#local-proxy-ports#error-modal-t.description: Title of the message box showing the error message when it is detected that the user has chosen a local proxy port (either HTTP or SOCKS) that is already in use and therefore can't be used by Sifoon.

settings#local-proxy-ports#heading.description: Settings section heading. In this section the user can specify what network ports the local Sifoon processes should use (Sifoon uses two such ports). For most people, this should be set to automatic.

settings#local-proxy-ports#http-label.description: Label for the text box where the user will enter their desired local port for the Sifoon HTTP/HTTPS process. The full term for this would be 'Desired HTTP and HTTPS local proxy port', but is shortened.

settings#local-proxy-ports#leave-blank.message: Dejar en blanco para selección automática de puerto (recomendado).
settings#local-proxy-ports#leave-blank.description: Help text that appears above the 'Local Proxy Ports' settings. 'blank' is the default and best value, and is bolded.

settings#local-proxy-ports#reason.message: Si en su computadora utiliza herramientas que requieren configuración manual para funcionar con Sifoon, querrá que Sifoon use los mismos números de puerto local de forma consistente. Si no tiene un motivo para especificar números de puerto, debe permitir a Sifoon escogerlos automáticamente para ayudar a evitar conflictos.
settings#local-proxy-ports#reason.description: Help text in the 'Local Proxy Ports' settings area. This explains to the user why they might want to override the default (automatic) settings values. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#local-proxy-ports#socks-label.description: Label for the text box where the user will enter their desired local port for the Sifoon SOCKS process. The full term for this would be 'Desired SOCKS local proxy port', but is shortened. 'SOCKS' is a proxy protocol. Any user for whom this setting is useful will know what that means.

settings#local-proxy-ports#unique-error-.message: Los puertos locales tienen que ser distintos entre si.
settings#local-proxy-ports#unique-error-.description: Error message that shows if the HTTP local proxy port and SOCKS local proxy port are set to a value and are the same as each other. The local ports must be different from each other. Or one or both of the fields can be empty, which means 'automatic selection'.

settings#manual-cdn-ips#help-text.message: Specify manual IP addresses for CDN fronting. Supports multiple IPs per line.

settings#manual-cdn-ips#placeholder.message: Enter IPs, one or more per line...

settings#port-value-error-msg.description: Error text that appears when the user enters an invalid network port number. As indicated, a valid port number must be a number between 1 and 65535, inclusive. This text is not visible until an invalid value is entered.

settings#proxy-google-ips.description: Label for the 'Proxy Google IPs' checkbox in Google Script settings.

settings#reset-button.description: Text on the button that resets the Sifoon settings values to default. This will typically be pressed if the user has configured something incorrectly and needs to get back to the default state.

settings#saved-message.description: Pop-up message shown to users after they have changed their settings (but they aren't currently connected, so there's no reconnect or further action).

settings#skip-upstream-proxy#enable-labe.description: Label for the checkbox to disable upstream proxy.

settings#skip-upstream-proxy#heading.description: Heading for the setting to disable upstream proxy.

settings#split-tunnel#enable-label.message: No proxyficar sitios web dentro de su país
settings#split-tunnel#enable-label.description: The label on the checkbox that enables 'Split Tunnel'.

settings#split-tunnel#heading.description: Settings section heading. If the user clicks this, the 'Split Tunnel' section will expand and can be edited. If 'split tunnel' is enabled, if the user is trying to get to a website in his/her own country, they will connect to it directly, instead of through Sifoon.

settings#split-tunnel#help-text.message: Si se habilita, las solicitudes hechas a servidores dentro de su país de residencia no serán enviadas a través del túnel de Sifoon.
settings#split-tunnel#help-text.description: Text explaining to the user what the 'Split Tunnel' setting does if enabled. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#split-tunnel#reason.message: Los sitios web dentro de su país de residencia generalmente no se encuentran bloqueados, por lo que habilitando esta opción le dará a ud. un acceso veloz a estos sitios y algunas veces reducirá los costos de uso de ISP.
settings#split-tunnel#reason.description: Help text in the 'Split Tunnel' settings section explaining to the user why they might want to modify (enable) the setting.

settings#split-tunnel-chinese-sites#enab.message: No usar proxy en sitios web chinos
settings#split-tunnel-chinese-sites#enab.description: The label on the checkbox that enables 'Split Tunnel' for Chinese websites, regardless of what region the user is in.

settings#split-tunnel-chinese-sites#note.message: ADVERTENCIA: Esta característica usa datos que podrían no siempre ser confiables. Usa precaución cuando la habilites, ya que algunos sitios web censurados podrían ser excluídos del proxy sin intención.
settings#split-tunnel-chinese-sites#note.description: A note cautioning the user that this feature may result in some sites being unproxied unintentionally.

settings#systray-minimize#enable-label.message: Minimizar en el área de notificación (bandeja del sistema)
settings#systray-minimize#enable-label.description: The label on the checkbox that enables 'Minimize to Notification Area (System Tray)'.

settings#systray-minimize#heading.message: Minimizar al área de notificación (bandeja del sistema)
settings#systray-minimize#heading.description: Settings section heading. In this section the user can choose to enable or disable the ability for the Sifoon application window to be hidden as a notification area icon when minimized. 'Notification area' is the official term for the icons located near the clock on the Windows taskbar, but it's also often called the 'system tray' or 'systray' -- use whatever is most common in your language, and be verbose if necessary.

settings#systray-minimize#help-text.message: Si está habilitada, cuando la ventana de la aplicación Sifoon esté minimizada se ocultará en el área de notificación (también conocida como la "bandeja del sistema" o "systray", localizada junto al reloj en la barra de tareas de su Windows).
settings#systray-minimize#help-text.description: Text explaining to the user what the 'Minimize to Notification Area (System Tray)' setting does if enabled. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#systray-minimize#reason.message: Minimizar Sifoon en el área de notificación ('bandeja del sistema') libera espacio en su barra de tareas. Esto es especialmente útil si a menudo ejecuta Sifoon durante largos periodos de tiempo.
settings#systray-minimize#reason.description: Help text in the 'Minimize to Systray' settings section explaining to the user why they might want to enable it. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#transport-mode#check-label.description: Label for the checkbox that allows the user to indicate that they want to use the non-default network transport mode. This mode is generally inferior for circumvention and not recommended. 'L2TP/IPSec' is the technical name for a type of virtual private network and should probably not be translated.

settings#transport-mode#heading.description: Settings section heading. In this section the user can choose to use an alternative connection and data transfer method -- also known as 'transport'.

settings#transport-mode#help-text.message: Usa interconexión virtual L2TP/IPSec de Windows (VPN). Este modo derivará por túnel el tráfico de todas sus aplicaciones, pero no proporciona ofuscación y por tanto no tiene capacidades robustas para la elusión de la censura. No está recomendado para evitar la mayoría de los cortafuegos (firewalls).
settings#transport-mode#help-text.description: Help text for the 'Use L2TP/IPSec mode' transport selection checkbox. It gives some technical details and indicates that this mode is not recommended.

settings#unapplied-changes-prompt#apply-.description: Text on a button of the modal dialog box that appears when the user has modified their changes, but has not applied the changes before trying to navigate to another tab. At that time the user is propmted with the choice to apply or discard the changes. This button will apply the changes -- that is, save the changes and make them immediately take effect. Should be read like the verb in 'Apply your changes'.

settings#unapplied-changes-prompt#body.message:
Ha realizado cambios en su configuración, pero no ha aplicado los cambios.

¿Desea aplicar sus cambios ahora o descartarlos?
settings#unapplied-changes-prompt#body.description: Body text of the modal dialog box that appears when the user has modified their changes, but has not applied the changes before trying to navigate to another tab. At that time the user is propmted with the choice to apply or discard the changes.

settings#unapplied-changes-prompt#discar.description: Text on a button of the modal dialog box that appears when the user has modified their changes, but has not applied the changes before trying to navigate to another tab. At that time the user is propmted with the choice to apply or discard the changes. This button will discard the changes -- that is, throw away the changes to the settings the user has made since viewing the settings tab.  Should be read like the verb in 'Discard your changes'.

settings#unapplied-changes-prompt#title.description: Title of the modal dialog box that appears when the user has modified their changes, but has not applied the changes before trying to navigate to another tab. At that time the user is propmted with the choice to apply or discard the changes.

settings#upstream-proxy#by-default.message: Si su computadora ya tiene un proxy (interpuesto) configurado, Sifoon usará por defecto ese proxy al establecer un túnel. Puede reemplazar ese comportamiento especificando un proxy a utilizar, o especificando que no debe usarse tal "proxy al exterior".
settings#upstream-proxy#by-default.description: Help text indicating the default (and best) configuration and behavior for the 'Upstream Proxy' setting. It also indicates what will happen if the setting is overridden or disabled. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#upstream-proxy#domain-label.description: Label for the text box where the user can set the domain for the 'upstream proxy'.

settings#upstream-proxy#error-modal-body.message:
Ha configurado Sifoon para que use un "proxy al exterior".
Sin embargo, parace que no podemos conectar a un servidor Sifoon a través de ese proxy.
Por favor, corrija la configuración e inténtelo de nuevo.
settings#upstream-proxy#error-modal-body.description: Main text in the 'Upstream Proxy Error' dialog box. This is shown when the user has directly altered these settings, and those settings are (probably) erroneous. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#upstream-proxy#error-modal-body.message:
Sifoon actualmente está configurado para usar el proxy (interpuesto) de su sistema como su "proxy al exterior".
Sin embargo, parece que no podemos conectar a un servidor Sifoon a través de ese proxy.
Por favor, habilite "No usar el proxy al exterior" e inténtelo de nuevo.
settings#upstream-proxy#error-modal-body.description: Main text in the 'Upstream Proxy Error' dialog box. This is shown when the user has not directly altered these settings (yet), but the default is causing a problem. The word 'Sifoon' must not be translated or transliterated.

settings#upstream-proxy#error-modal-titl.description: Title of the message box showing the error message when a problem is detected with the user's 'upstream proxy settings'.

settings#upstream-proxy#heading.description: Settings section heading. In this section the user can specify network information to use an 'upstream proxy', which is a separate proxy that Sifoon will connect through to get to its own server. This is most often used by people in school or work networks that force them to connect out to the Internet through a particular server. This setting can also disable automatic upstream proxy use.

settings#upstream-proxy#hostname-label.description: Label for the text box where the user can set the hostname for the 'upstream proxy'. 'Hostname' means approximately the same thing as 'server network name or identifier'.

settings#upstream-proxy#password-label.description: Label for the text box where the user can set the password for the 'upstream proxy'.

settings#upstream-proxy#port-label.description: Label for the text box where the user can set the network port number for the 'upstream proxy' that they would like to use.

settings#upstream-proxy#proxy-reqs.message: Sólo están permitidos proxys HTTP que soporten HTTPS.
settings#upstream-proxy#proxy-reqs.description: Help text beside the upstream proxy settings indicating what type of upstream proxies can by used by Sifoon (different proxies are of different types and have different capabilities, and Sifoon has certain requirements).

settings#upstream-proxy#reason.message: Los proxys (interpuestos) al exterior a veces son requeridos por escuelas, universidades, o negocios. Si conoce la configuración de proxy al exterior requerida por su proveedor de red, entonces configurarlo manualmente aquí puede que sea necesario para conectar.
settings#upstream-proxy#reason.description: Help text describing why the user might need to modify the upstream proxy settings in order to successfully connect to the Sifoon server.

settings#upstream-proxy#set-hostname-err.message: Tienes que proveer un Nombre de Servidor, o dejar todos los campos de Proxy de Nivel Superior en blanco para su selección automática.
settings#upstream-proxy#set-hostname-err.description: Error message that is shown if the user enters a value for one of the other upstream proxy fields but not for 'hostname', which is required. Alternatively, the user can leave all fields blank to allow the automatic behaviour.

settings#upstream-proxy#set-username-err.message: Tienes que proveer un Nombre de Usuario si estás estableciendo la Contraseña o el Dominio, o dejar todos los campos en blanco para no usar autentificación.
settings#upstream-proxy#set-username-err.description: Error message that is shown if the user enters a value for one of 'Password' or 'Domain', but does not provide a 'Username' -- this is not valid, as username is are required. Alternatively, the user can leave all authentication fields blank to use an upstream proxy which doesn't require authentication.

settings#upstream-proxy#skip-label.description: Label for the checkbox that allows the user to override the default 'upstream proxy' usage and totally disable the feature.

settings#upstream-proxy#username-label.description: Label for the text box where the user can set the username for the 'upstream proxy'.

settings#vpn-incompatible-label.description: If 'L2TP/IPSec mode' is enabled, this text shows up in a label beside the Settings sections which are incompatible with L2TP/IPSec mode. It is intended to draw the user's attention to the fact that some of the other settings have become disabled.

settings#vpn-incompatible-msg.description: If 'L2TP/IPSec mode' is enabled, this text is displayed under or beside settings which are incompatible with L2TP/IPSec mode and have been disabled because of it. It is intended to let the user know why the setting has been disabled.

ui#alert#url-copied-to-clipboard.message:
URL copiado al portapapeles.
Si el navegador no se abre, pega el URL dentro de la barra de direcciones del navegador.
ui#alert#url-copied-to-clipboard.description:
Sometimes when the Sifoon UI tries to open an external URL in the browser, it fails to open. This message indicates to the user that URL has been copied to the Windows system clipboard and is available for pasting into a browser. `
` may be used to split the message over two lines to ensure the alert doesn't take too much horizontal space.
